title: Lambda Calculus
description: In this project, I built a parser and interpreter for the λ-calculus in Python. In the end, I was able to create some smaller programs in my self-developed programming language

title: Path-Finder
description: In this project I implemented the AStar, Dijksta, Depth-First and Breadth-First pathfinding-algorithms in a react-app. Additionally, I created a basic UI to interact with the game

title: Monopoly-Bank
description: I built a website for a custom-made 'Monopoly-Cities' I've built with my friends. The website is the programming part of the project, while my colleagues created the physical game

title: Task-Planner
description: This is a small Task-Tracker website that allows you to keep track of your Projects. The website is built as a PWA, so you can download the website and use it offline as well

title: Mock-Trading
description: This project implements a Mock-Trading Website, where you can buy and sell cryptocurrencies. The prices get updated regularly, so you can see how your money grows in real-time

title: Expense-Tracker
description: In this project, I built a simple Expense-Tracker to keep track of all the expenses I made. The underlying database was created with a MariaDB-Server running on my local backend-server

title: Mineflayer-Compiler
description: This project explores the mineflayer-api for minecraft bots. But instead of creating the underlying state-machine by hand, I built an entire compiler / programming language around it

title: Restaurant-App
description: This Application is the result of a university project I created together with my team. The goal was to build a website where you can create restaurants-reservations in munich

title: Tile Planner
description: A project built for my Dad to help him plan his next tile project. It is a simple web app that allows him to draw a floor plan and place tiles into it

title: Personpedia
description: This website represents an online encyclopedia of famous people. It was created together with a friend of mine and heavily makes use of AI to generate content

title: Algo Explorer
description: The goal of the project is to provide an easy way to learn how an algorithm works by visualizing its behavior step by step. Many fundamental algorithms can be explored

title: Fuzzy Tuning for AutoPas
description: A bachelor's thesis on fuzzy-logic tuning for AutoPas molecular-dynamics simulations. Explore the

title: Cell Collectives
description: A simulation platform to study the behavior of bacteria and cellular dynamics in biological systems. This was developed as part of my IDP thesis at TUM

title: Panic! At the Console
